steps.title: Spot the contextual signal
steps.content: The blank links damage to its source: Soviet censors. The novel was harmed by the censors, so the blank needs a phrase meaning 'caused by.'

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The phrase needs to mean "caused by" or "inflicted by," linking the damage to its source: Soviet censors. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — bestowed on: given as a gift to — implies the damage was a gift presented to the censors, which is nonsensical. ✗
  • Choice B — wrought by: brought about or caused by — correctly describes damage inflicted by Soviet censors on the novel. ✓
  • Choice C — allocated to: distributed or assigned to — implies the damage was assigned to the censors as a resource, not that they caused it. ✗
  • Choice D — concealed from: hidden from — would mean the damage was kept secret from the censors, reversing the relationship entirely. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
